title: Outlier Detection Summary
objective: Flag extreme numeric values by robust IQR rules and visualize their feature-level prevalence.
method: Computed IQR lower/upper fences for numeric predictors after treating impossible zero values as missing.
results: Most IQR outliers are in trestbps with 27 flagged rows.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
IQR outliers in clinical data can be valid high-risk observations, not automatic exclusions.
